<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es" class="h-full">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Mente en Acción — CCR S.A E.S.P</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com/3.4.17"></script>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;0,800;0,900;1,400;1,700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    :root {
      --verde-oscuro: #005357;
      --azul-turquesa: #00a5ba;
      --verde-lima: #dbf09b;
      --bg-cream: #f0f7f7;
      --text-dark: #1a2e2f;
    }
    html, body { height: 100%; margin: 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; }
    .font-playfair { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; }
    .font-jakarta { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; }

    .app-wrapper {
      width: 100%;
      min-height: 100%;
      overflow-y: auto;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      background: var(--bg-cream);
    }

    @keyframes blobMove {
      0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
      33% { transform: translate(30px, -20px) scale(1.05); }
      66% { transform: translate(-20px, 15px) scale(0.95); }
    }
    .blob { animation: blobMove 8s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .blob-delay { animation-delay: -3s; }

    @keyframes fadeSlideUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-in { animation: fadeSlideUp 0.6s ease-out both; }
    .anim-d1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
    .anim-d2 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .anim-d3 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
    .anim-d4 { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

    .card-lift { transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; }
    .card-lift:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,83,87,0.12); }

    @keyframes marquee {
      0%   { transform: translateX(0); }
      100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }
    .marquee-track { animation: marquee 25s linear infinite; }

    .pill {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 4px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    .quote-mark {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: 5rem;
      line-height: 1;
      color: var(--verde-lima);
      position: absolute;
      top: -10px;
      left: 10px;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    .wave-divider {
      height: 40px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--verde-oscuro) 25%, var(--azul-turquesa) 75%);
      clip-path: polygon(0 60%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0% 100%);
    }

    .ticker-strip {
      background: var(--verde-oscuro);
      color: var(--verde-lima);
      overflow: hidden;
      white-space: nowrap;
      padding: 8px 0;
    }

    .grid-pattern {
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,165,186,0.08) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 24px 24px;
    }

    .check-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 10px;
      padding: 8px 0;
    }
    .check-icon {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 22px;
      height: 22px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--verde-lima);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    /* Breathing circle transition */
    #breath-circle {
      transition: transform 1s ease-in-out, background 0.5s;
    }

    /* Scroll reveal */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(28px);
      transition: opacity 0.65s ease, transform 0.65s ease;
    }
    .reveal.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    /* Nav active */
    .nav-btn { transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; }
  
    /* ── SIDEBAR LAYOUT ─────────────────── */
    .page-shell {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      max-width: 1280px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    /* Sidebar */
    .sidebar {
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      width: 220px;
      min-width: 220px;
      height: 100vh;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #005357 0%, #003d40 100%);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow-y: auto;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      z-index: 50;
      box-shadow: 3px 0 20px rgba(0,83,87,.25);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(219,240,155,.3); border-radius: 4px; }

    .sidebar-logo {
      padding: 20px 14px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    }
    .sidebar-logo img { height: 52px; display: block; }

    .sidebar-label {
      padding: 14px 14px 6px;
      font-size: .62rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(219,240,155,.55);
    }

    .sidebar-nav {
      padding: 4px 10px 20px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 3px;
      flex: 1;
    }

    .side-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(219,240,155,.12) !important;
      color: white !important;
      transform: translateX(3px);
    }
    .side-btn.active {
      background: var(--verde-lima, #dbf09b) !important;
      color: var(--verde-oscuro, #005357) !important;
    }

    .sidebar-footer {
      padding: 12px 14px;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
      font-size: .65rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,.3);
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* Main content area beside sidebar */
    .content-area {
      flex: 1;
      min-width: 0;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* Remove old sticky top nav */
    .old-sticky-nav { display: none !important; }

    /* Adjust max-width inside content */
    .content-area header,
    .content-area .wave-divider,
    .content-area main,
    .content-area footer {
      /* full width within content area */
    }

    /* Mobile: collapse sidebar */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .page-shell { flex-direction: column; }
      .sidebar {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0; left: -220px;
        height: 100vh;
        transition: left .3s ease;
        z-index: 100;
      }
      .sidebar.open { left: 0; }
      .mob-toggle {
        position: fixed;
        top: 12px; left: 12px;
        z-index: 110;
        width: 40px; height: 40px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: var(--teal, #005357);
        color: #dbf09b;
        border: none; cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.3);
      }
      .mob-overlay {
        display: none;
        position: fixed; inset: 0;
        background: rgba(0,0,0,.4);
        z-index: 99;
      }
      .mob-overlay.open { display: block; }
    }
    @media (min-width: 769px) {
      .mob-toggle, .mob-overlay { display: none !important; }
    }

  </style>
</head>

<body class="h-full">
<div class="page-shell">

<!-- MOBILE TOGGLE -->
<button class="mob-toggle" onclick="toggleSidebar()" id="mob-btn">☰</button>
<div class="mob-overlay" id="mob-overlay" onclick="closeSidebar()"></div>

<!-- SIDEBAR -->
<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-logo">
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);border-radius:10px;padding:7px 10px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="CCR S.A E.S.P">
    </div>
    <p style="color:rgba(219,240,155,.7);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 0;">Boletín de Bienestar</p>
    <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);font-size:.6rem;margin:2px 0 0;">Edición #01 · Marzo 2026</p>
  </div>
  <div class="sidebar-label">Navegación</div>
  <nav class="sidebar-nav">
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-bienestar-mes',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;background:var(--teal);color:var(--lime);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎉</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Bienestar Marzo</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-ingresos',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">👥</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Nuevos Ingresos</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-cumples',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎂</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Cumpleaños Abril</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-bienestar',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🌱</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Bienestar Emocional</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-estres',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🔥</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Estrés Laboral</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-pausas',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🧘</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Pausas Activas</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-relaciones',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🤝</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Relaciones</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-tips',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">⚡</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Tips del Día</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-institucional',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🏢</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">CCR Contigo</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-johan',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎓</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Felicitaciones</span>
        </button>
        <button
          onclick="goSide('sec-palabras',this)"
          class="side-btn"
          style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:none;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;text-align:left;transition:background .18s,color .18s,transform .15s;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);"
        >
          <span style="font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;">✍️</span>
          <span style="line-height:1.3;">Palabras que Construyen</span>
        </button>
  </nav>
  <div class="sidebar-footer">
    CCR S.A E.S.P © 2026<br>
    <span style="color:rgba(219,240,155,.5);">"Cuidar de ti es cuidar de todos"</span>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- CONTENT AREA -->
<div class="content-area" id="content-area">

<div class="app-wrapper grid-pattern" id="app-root">

  <!-- ══ TICKER ══ -->
  <div class="ticker-strip">
    <div class="flex marquee-track" style="width: max-content;">
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">🧠 Tu salud mental es prioridad</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">💚 Cuidarte es un acto de valentía</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">🌿 Respira, enfoca, avanza</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">✨ Hoy es un buen día para estar bien</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">🤝 Juntos construimos bienestar en CCR</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">🧠 Tu salud mental es prioridad</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">💚 Cuidarte es un acto de valentía</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">🌿 Respira, enfoca, avanza</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">✨ Hoy es un buen día para estar bien</span>
      <span class="mx-8 text-sm font-jakarta font-medium">🤝 Juntos construimos bienestar en CCR</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ HEADER ══ -->
  <header class="relative overflow-hidden" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #005357 0%, #007a80 40%, #00a5ba 100%);">
    <!-- Blobs -->
    <div class="blob absolute top-[-40px] right-[-40px] w-64 h-64 rounded-full opacity-20" style="background: #dbf09b;"></div>
    <div class="blob blob-delay absolute bottom-[-30px] left-[10%] w-48 h-48 rounded-full opacity-15" style="background: #00a5ba;"></div>

    <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6 py-8 relative z-10">
      <!-- Top row: logo + edition -->
      <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6 anim-in">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3" id="header-logo">
          <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.97); border-radius:12px; padding:8px 12px; box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); display:inline-flex; align-items:center;">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="CCR S.A E.S.P" style="height:56px; display:block;">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
          <span class="pill" style="background: rgba(219,240,155,0.2); color: var(--verde-lima);">📰 Edición #01 · 2026</span>
          <span class="text-white/70 text-sm font-jakarta" id="edition-date"></span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Title -->
      <div class="text-center py-6">
        <div class="anim-in anim-d1">
          <span class="pill mb-4" style="background: var(--verde-lima); color: var(--verde-oscuro);">Periódico de Bienestar Laboral</span>
        </div>
        <h1 class="font-playfair font-black text-white leading-tight mt-4 anim-in anim-d2" style="font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 4.5rem);" id="main-title">
          Mente en <span style="color: var(--verde-lima);">Acción</span>
        </h1>
        <p class="font-jakarta text-white/80 text-lg mt-4 max-w-lg mx-auto anim-in anim-d3" id="slogan">
          "Tu bienestar emocional transforma tu día a día" ✨
        </p>

        <!-- Stats pills -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mt-6 max-w-sm mx-auto anim-in anim-d4">
          <div class="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur rounded-2xl p-4 text-center">
            <div class="text-3xl mb-1">🧘</div>
            <div class="text-white font-bold text-lg font-jakarta">6</div>
            <div class="text-white/60 text-xs font-jakarta">Secciones</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur rounded-2xl p-4 text-center">
            <div class="text-3xl mb-1">💡</div>
            <div class="text-white font-bold text-lg font-jakarta">12+</div>
            <div class="text-white/60 text-xs font-jakarta">Tips prácticos</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur rounded-2xl p-4 text-center">
            <div class="text-3xl mb-1">❤️</div>
            <div class="text-white font-bold text-lg font-jakarta">100%</div>
            <div class="text-white/60 text-xs font-jakarta">Para ti</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="wave-divider"></div>

  <!-- ══ STICKY NAV ══ (hidden - replaced by sidebar) -->
  <nav class="sticky top-0 z-30 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md shadow-sm border-b border-teal-100 old-sticky-nav">
    <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 flex gap-1 overflow-x-auto py-2" id="nav-tabs">
      <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-bienestar-mes', this)" class="nav-btn px-3 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="background: var(--verde-oscuro); color: var(--verde-lima);">🎉 Bienestar Marzo</button>
    <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-ingresos', this)" class="nav-btn px-3 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">👥 Nuevos Ingresos</button>
    <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-cumples', this)" class="nav-btn px-3 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🎂 Cumpleaños Abril</button>
    <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-bienestar', this)" class="nav-btn px-3 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🌱 Bienestar Emocional</button>
      <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-estres', this)" class="nav-btn px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🔥 Estrés Laboral</button>
      <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-pausas', this)" class="nav-btn px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🧘 Pausas Activas</button>
      <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-relaciones', this)" class="nav-btn px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🤝 Relaciones</button>
      <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-tips', this)" class="nav-btn px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">⚡ Tips del Día</button>
      <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-institucional', this)" class="nav-btn px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🏢 CCR Contigo</button>
    <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-johan', this)" class="nav-btn px-3 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">🎓 Felicitaciones</button>
    <button onclick="scrollToSection('sec-palabras', this)" class="nav-btn px-3 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-jakarta font-semibold whitespace-nowrap" style="color: var(--verde-oscuro);">✍️ Palabras que Construyen</button>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <!-- ══ MAIN ══ -->
  <main class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 py-10">



    <!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
         SECCIÓN: FELICITACIONES JOHAN CAMILO
    ════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <section id="sec-johan" class="mb-16 scroll-mt-20 reveal">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;">
        <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:#dbf09b;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎓</div>
        <div>
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.5rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">¡Logro que celebramos!</h2>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.82rem;margin:2px 0 0;">Cuando un compañero triunfa, todos ganamos</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="height:3px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:22px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#dbf09b,#00a5ba,#005357);"></div>

      <div style="background:white;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 6px 28px rgba(0,83,87,.12);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);">
        <!-- Header decorativo -->
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357 0%,#007a80 50%,#00a5ba 100%);padding:24px 28px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:-20px;right:-20px;width:140px;height:140px;border-radius:50%;background:#dbf09b;opacity:.1;"></div>
          <div style="position:absolute;bottom:-30px;left:30%;width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;background:#00a5ba;opacity:.15;"></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;position:relative;z-index:1;">
            <span style="font-size:2.5rem;">🎓</span>
            <div>
              <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;background:rgba(219,240,155,.25);color:#dbf09b;margin-bottom:6px;">Logro Institucional · Marzo 2026</span>
              <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:900;font-size:1.4rem;color:white;margin:0;line-height:1.2;">¡Felicitaciones, Johan Camilo!</h3>
              <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:.82rem;margin:4px 0 0;">Ingeniero Ambiental — Universidad Antonio Nariño</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Contenido principal -->
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;">
          <!-- Texto -->
          <div style="padding:28px 28px 28px 30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;">
            <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:1.05rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 16px;line-height:1.5;">"El esfuerzo constante tiene nombre, tiene rostro y hoy tiene título."</p>
            <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.82;margin-bottom:12px;">Con enorme orgullo, CCR S.A E.S.P celebra que nuestro compañero <strong style="color:#005357;">Johan Camilo Melgarejo Castellanos</strong> ha obtenido oficialmente su título profesional como <strong style="color:#005357;">Ingeniero Ambiental</strong> de la Universidad Antonio Nariño.</p>
            <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.82;margin-bottom:18px;">Este logro es el resultado de años de dedicación, sacrificio y perseverancia. Hoy, Johan no solo es un ejemplo para todo el equipo, sino una prueba de que cuando uno se propone metas, las alcanza.</p>
            <p style="font-size:.85rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.82;margin-bottom:18px;">¡Toda la familia CCR te felicita y se enorgullece de tenerte en nuestro equipo! 🌿🌍</p>
            <!-- Badge de logro -->
            <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,83,87,.07),rgba(219,240,155,.25));border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;">
              <div style="width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.5rem;flex-shrink:0;">🏆</div>
              <div>
                <p style="font-weight:700;font-size:.85rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Johan Camilo Melgarejo Castellanos</p>
                <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#5a7a7c;margin:3px 0 0;">Ingeniero Ambiental · Universidad Antonio Nariño</p>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                  <span style="background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;">🌿 Ingeniería Ambiental</span>
                  <span style="background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;">🎓 Título Profesional 2026</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Foto -->
          <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:420px;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Johan Camilo Melgarejo Castellanos - Ingeniero Ambiental" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;transition:transform .6s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.04)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
            <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,83,87,.7) 0%,transparent 45%);"></div>
            <div style="position:absolute;bottom:16px;left:16px;right:16px;">
              <p style="color:white;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;margin:0 0 5px;">Johan Camilo Melgarejo Castellanos</p>
              <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:.75rem;margin:0;">Ingeniero Ambiental · UAN · 2026</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Footer de felicitación -->
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(219,240,155,.3),rgba(0,165,186,.1));padding:18px 28px;text-align:center;border-top:1px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);">
          <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 6px;">🎉 ¡Felicitaciones de todo el equipo CCR! 🎉</p>
          <p style="font-size:.8rem;color:#5a7a7c;margin:0;">"El cielo no es el límite cuando tienes el conocimiento, la voluntad y el compromiso. ¡Sigue brillando, Johan!"</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
         SECCIÓN: PALABRAS QUE CONSTRUYEN
    ════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <section id="sec-palabras" class="mb-16 scroll-mt-20 reveal">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;">
        <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:#dbf09b;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;">✍️</div>
        <div>
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.5rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Palabras que Construyen</h2>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.82rem;margin:2px 0 0;">Espacio de ortografía para fortalecer nuestra comunicación escrita</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="height:3px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:22px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#005357,#00a5ba,#dbf09b);"></div>

      <!-- Intro card -->
      <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);border-radius:20px;padding:22px 26px;margin-bottom:18px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:-15px;right:-15px;width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;background:#dbf09b;opacity:.1;"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;position:relative;z-index:1;">
          <span style="font-size:2.5rem;">📖</span>
          <div>
            <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem;color:white;margin:0 0 5px;">Reglas Ortográficas del Uso de la <span style="color:#dbf09b;">B</span></h3>
            <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:.8rem;margin:0;">Escribir bien es comunicar mejor. ¡Aplica estas reglas en tu día a día!</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Reglas en grid -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;">

        <!-- Regla 10 -->
        <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 12px 28px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07)'">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
            <div style="width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">10</div>
            <h4 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">B después de sa-, si-, so-, su-</h4>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:10px;">Se escribe con <strong style="color:#005357;">b</strong> después de las sílabas <strong>sa-, si-, so-, su-</strong>.</p>
          <div style="background:#e8f5f5;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <p style="font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#005357;margin:0 0 5px;">✅ Ejemplos:</p>
            <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#3d6062;margin:0;font-style:italic;"><strong>sa</strong>bor, <strong>Si</strong>beria, <strong>so</strong>berbia, <strong>su</strong>basta</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(255,140,0,.08);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;">
            <p style="font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#b86000;margin:0 0 4px;">⚠️ Excepciones:</p>
            <p style="font-size:.73rem;color:#7a5000;margin:0;font-style:italic;">savia, soviético</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Regla 11 -->
        <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 12px 28px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07)'">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
            <div style="width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">11</div>
            <h4 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">B en palabras con bo + consonante</h4>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:10px;">Se escriben con <strong style="color:#005357;">b</strong> palabras que comienzan con <strong>bo</strong> seguidas de consonantes: d, ch, f, n, r, t.</p>
          <div style="background:#e8f5f5;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <p style="font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#005357;margin:0 0 5px;">✅ Ejemplos:</p>
            <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#3d6062;margin:0;font-style:italic;"><strong>bo</strong>da, <strong>bo</strong>fetada, <strong>bo</strong>nachón, <strong>bo</strong>rde, <strong>bo</strong>tón, <strong>bo</strong>chinche</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(255,140,0,.08);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;">
            <p style="font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#b86000;margin:0 0 4px;">⚠️ Excepciones:</p>
            <p style="font-size:.73rem;color:#7a5000;margin:0;font-style:italic;">voraz, votar, vorágine</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Regla 12 -->
        <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 12px 28px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07)'">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
            <div style="width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">12</div>
            <h4 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">bi-, bis-, biz- (dos o doble)</h4>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:10px;">Cuando los sonidos <strong>bi, bis, biz</strong> tienen el significado de <em>dos</em> o <em>doble</em>, se escriben con <strong style="color:#005357;">b</strong>.</p>
          <div style="background:#e8f5f5;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;">
            <p style="font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#005357;margin:0 0 5px;">✅ Ejemplos:</p>
            <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#3d6062;margin:0;font-style:italic;"><strong>bi</strong>sílaba, <strong>bis</strong>abuelo, <strong>biz</strong>co</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Regla 13 -->
        <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 12px 28px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07)'">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
            <div style="width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">13</div>
            <h4 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Sílabas ab-, ob-, sub- al inicio</h4>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:10px;">Se escriben con <strong style="color:#005357;">b</strong> las sílabas <strong>ab-, ob-, sub-</strong> al inicio de una palabra.</p>
          <div style="background:#e8f5f5;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;">
            <p style="font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#005357;margin:0 0 5px;">✅ Ejemplos:</p>
            <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#3d6062;margin:0;font-style:italic;"><strong>ab</strong>domen, <strong>ob</strong>sequio, <strong>sub</strong>rayar</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Regla 14 — col-span 2 -->
        <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);grid-column:span 2;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 12px 28px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07)'">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;">
            <div style="width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">14</div>
            <h4 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Terminaciones -bundo/-bunda, -bilidad, -ble</h4>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:12px;">Se escriben con <strong style="color:#005357;">b</strong> las terminaciones <strong>-bundo, -bunda, -bilidad, -ble</strong>.</p>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;">
            <div style="background:#e8f5f5;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;">
              <p style="font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#005357;margin:0 0 5px;">✅ Ejemplos:</p>
              <p style="font-size:.75rem;color:#3d6062;margin:0;font-style:italic;">medita<strong>bundo</strong>, a<strong>bunda</strong>, agra<strong>da</strong><strong>ble</strong>, disponi<strong>bilidad</strong></p>
            </div>
            <div style="background:rgba(255,140,0,.08);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;">
              <p style="font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#b86000;margin:0 0 4px;">⚠️ Excepciones:</p>
              <p style="font-size:.73rem;color:#7a5000;margin:0;font-style:italic;">mo<strong>v</strong>ilidad, ci<strong>v</strong>ilidad (van con <strong>v</strong>)</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div><!-- /grid reglas -->

      <!-- Cierre motivacional -->
      <div style="margin-top:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,83,87,.06),rgba(219,240,155,.2));border-radius:16px;padding:18px 22px;text-align:center;border:1.5px dashed rgba(0,83,87,.15);">
        <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 6px;">✨ ¿Sabías que escribir bien refleja profesionalismo?</p>
        <p style="font-size:.8rem;color:#5a7a7c;margin:0;">Cada correo, informe o mensaje que redactas habla por ti. ¡Construye palabras que construyan tu imagen! 💬</p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SECCIÓN 1: BIENESTAR EMOCIONAL -->
    

    <!-- NEW SECTIONS: BIENESTAR MARZO, INGRESOS, CUMPLEAÑOS -->

    <!-- BIENESTAR DEL MES -->
    <section id="sec-bienestar-mes" class="mb-16 scroll-mt-20 reveal">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;">
        <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:#dbf09b;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎉</div>
        <div>
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.5rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Bienestar del Mes — Marzo 2026</h2>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.82rem;margin:2px 0 0;">Un mes lleno de momentos que nos unen y fortalecen como equipo</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="height:3px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:22px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#005357,#00a5ba,#dbf09b);"></div>

      <!-- DÍA DE LA MUJER -->
      <div style="background:white;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);margin-bottom:18px;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 14px 36px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08)'">
        <div style="padding:16px 22px 10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,83,87,.05),rgba(0,165,186,.04));">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:1.3rem;">👩</span><span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;">8 de Marzo</span></div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 2px;">Día Internacional de la Mujer</h3>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.76rem;margin:0;">Celebrando la fortaleza, el talento y la dedicación de nuestras compañeras</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;padding:14px 22px 18px;">
          <div>
            <p style="font-size:.81rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:9px;">En CCR celebramos con orgullo el <strong>Día Internacional de la Mujer</strong>. Reconocemos el valioso aporte que cada una de nuestras compañeras hace al equipo. ¡Gracias por ser parte esencial de esta familia! 💐</p>
            <p style="font-size:.81rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.78;">Una oportunidad para visibilizar el talento femenino y reforzar nuestro compromiso con la equidad, el respeto y la igualdad de oportunidades.</p>
            <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;">💐 Reconocimiento especial</span>
              <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;">🤝 Equidad e inclusión</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
            <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;height:132px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.14);">
              <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Día de la Mujer CCR sala" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .5s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
              <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,83,87,.68) 0%,transparent 55%);"></div>
              <div style="position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:11px;"><span style="background:rgba(219,240,155,.92);color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:2px 9px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;">8 Marzo 2026</span></div>
            </div>
            <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;height:132px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.14);">
              <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Día de la Mujer CCR flores" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 20%;display:block;transition:transform .5s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
              <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,83,87,.68) 0%,transparent 55%);"></div>
              <div style="position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:11px;"><p style="color:white;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;margin:0;">¡Nuestras mujeres CCR — La fuerza del equipo!</p></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- DÍA DEL HOMBRE -->
      <div style="background:white;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);margin-bottom:18px;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 14px 36px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08)'">
        <div style="padding:16px 22px 10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,83,87,.05),rgba(0,165,186,.04));">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:1.3rem;">👨</span><span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;background:#00a5ba;color:white;">19 de Marzo</span></div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 2px;">Día Internacional del Hombre</h3>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.76rem;margin:0;">Reconociendo la dedicación y compromiso de nuestros compañeros</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;padding:14px 22px 18px;">
          <div>
            <p style="font-size:.81rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:9px;">El <strong>19 de marzo</strong> celebramos el Día Internacional del Hombre. Su esfuerzo, responsabilidad y compromiso son pilares fundamentales de nuestra organización.</p>
            <p style="font-size:.81rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.78;">En CCR creemos en un ambiente donde todos se sientan valorados y motivados para dar lo mejor de sí. ¡Gracias a todos nuestros compañeros! 💪</p>
            <div style="margin-top:10px;display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;">💪 Compromiso y esfuerzo</span>
              <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;">🌟 Reconocimiento</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.14);">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Día del Hombre CCR" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;transition:transform .5s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
            <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,83,87,.68) 0%,transparent 50%);"></div>
            <div style="position:absolute;bottom:10px;left:13px;">
              <span style="background:rgba(0,165,186,.9);color:white;border-radius:30px;padding:2px 9px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:4px;">19 Marzo 2026</span>
              <p style="color:white;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;margin:0;">¡Gracias por todo lo que hacen cada día!</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CAMBIO COMPENSAR -->
      <div style="background:white;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);margin-bottom:18px;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 14px 36px rgba(0,83,87,.13)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow='0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08)'">
        <div style="padding:16px 22px 10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,83,87,.05),rgba(219,240,155,.15));">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:4px;"><span style="font-size:1.3rem;">🏦</span><span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;background:#005357;color:#dbf09b;">Marzo 2026</span></div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 2px;">Cambio de Caja de Compensación Familiar — Compensar</h3>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.76rem;margin:0;">Una mejora importante en tus beneficios y bienestar</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;padding:14px 22px 18px;">
          <div>
            <p style="font-size:.81rem;color:#3d6062;line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:9px;">En CCR realizamos el <strong>cambio de Caja de Compensación Familiar a Compensar</strong>, una de las cajas con mayor cobertura y oferta de beneficios en Colombia.</p>
            <div style="background:#e8f5f5;border-radius:13px;padding:13px;margin-top:6px;">
              <p style="font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:7px;color:#005357;">🎁 Beneficios principales Compensar:</p>
              <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:#3d6062;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;">
                <div>🏥 Servicios de salud preventiva</div>
                <div>🏊 Piscinas, gimnasios y recreación</div>
                <div>📚 Educación y capacitación</div>
                <div>🏡 Subsidio de vivienda</div>
                <div>🎭 Cultura y entretenimiento</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.14);">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Evento Compensar CCR" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .5s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
            <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,83,87,.68) 0%,transparent 55%);"></div>
            <div style="position:absolute;bottom:10px;left:13px;">
              <span style="background:rgba(219,240,155,.92);color:#005357;border-radius:30px;padding:2px 9px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:4px;">Compensar 2026</span>
              <p style="color:white;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;margin:0;">Nuevos beneficios para ti y tu familia</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- REINDUCCIÓN -->
      <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#007a80);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;padding:26px 30px;position:relative;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:-20px;right:-20px;width:130px;height:130px;border-radius:50%;background:#dbf09b;opacity:.09;"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <span style="font-size:1.3rem;">📋</span>
          <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;background:rgba(219,240,155,.22);color:#dbf09b;">Marzo 2026</span>
        </div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem;color:white;margin:0 0 5px;">Ejecución de la Reinducción del Personal</h3>
        <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:.78rem;margin-bottom:16px;">Reforzando nuestros procesos, valores y compromiso organizacional</p>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:22px;align-items:start;position:relative;z-index:1;">
          <div>
            <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);font-size:.81rem;line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:9px;">La <strong style="color:white;">Reinducción del Personal</strong> alcanzó una ejecución del <strong style="color:#dbf09b;">95%</strong> durante marzo. Permitió actualizar conocimientos sobre procesos, normativa, valores corporativos y rutas de atención. ¡Gracias a todos por su participación! 🙌</p>
            <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;height:130px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);">
              <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Reinducción CCR" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;">
              <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,83,87,.6) 0%,transparent 55%);"></div>
              <div style="position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:11px;"><p style="color:white;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;margin:0;">Personal CCR en Reinducción</p></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;">
            <div style="position:relative;width:128px;height:128px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 120 120" style="width:128px;height:128px;transform:rotate(-90deg);">
                <circle cx="60" cy="60" r="50" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.15)" stroke-width="10"/>
                <circle cx="60" cy="60" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#dbf09b" stroke-width="10" stroke-dasharray="314" stroke-dashoffset="16" stroke-linecap="round"/>
              </svg>
              <div style="position:absolute;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
                <span style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:900;font-size:1.9rem;color:#dbf09b;line-height:1;">95%</span>
                <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;">Ejecución</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- NUEVOS INGRESOS -->
    <section id="sec-ingresos" class="mb-16 scroll-mt-20 reveal">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;">
        <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:#dbf09b;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;">👥</div>
        <div>
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.5rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Nuevos Ingresos — Marzo 2026</h2>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.82rem;margin:2px 0 0;">¡Bienvenidos a la familia CCR! Nos alegra tenerlos con nosotros</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="height:3px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:22px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#005357,#00a5ba,#dbf09b);"></div>
      <div style="background:white;border-radius:22px;padding:22px 24px;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,83,87,.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);">
        <p style="font-size:.81rem;color:#5a7a7c;margin-bottom:16px;">Damos la más cálida bienvenida a los 8 nuevos colaboradores que se unen a CCR este mes. ¡Su talento y energía son un gran aporte para nuestro equipo! 🌟</p>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;">
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">DB</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Deyni Johanna Balbuena Beltrán</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">👔 Supervisor</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">BQ</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Blanca Mireya Quimbayo Blanca</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">📦 Asistente de Logística</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">CN</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Cesar Nicolás Núñez Hernández</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">🏗️ Profesional II de Proyectos</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">LM</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Leidy Berenice Martínez Molina</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">🏥 Gestor de Salud e Inspección</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">JR</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Juan Diego Rivera Zambrano</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">🔬 Profesional Laboratorio</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">JR</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Jheferson Arley Romero Tapias</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">📐 Prof. Estudios y Diseños Junior</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">FB</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Felix Alejandro Brito Ramírez</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">🔧 Ayudante General</p></div></div>
<div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,83,87,.07);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,83,87,.07);transition:transform .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateX(4px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;">JL</div><div><p style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Jaider Mauricio López Yondapiz</p><p style="font-size:.7rem;color:#8aacad;margin:3px 0 0;">📘 Aprendiz Lectivo</p></div></div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;border-radius:14px;padding:14px;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,83,87,.07),rgba(219,240,155,.2));">
          <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.05rem;color:#005357;margin:0 0 4px;">¡Bienvenidos a CCR! 🎉</p>
          <p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#5a7a7c;margin:0;">Estamos felices de contar con su talento. Juntos hacemos grandes cosas.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- CUMPLEAÑOS ABRIL -->
    <section id="sec-cumples" class="mb-16 scroll-mt-20 reveal">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px;">
        <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:#dbf09b;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;">🎂</div>
        <div>
          <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.5rem;color:#005357;margin:0;">Cumpleaños de Abril 🎉</h2>
          <p style="color:#00a5ba;font-size:.82rem;margin:2px 0 0;">¡Celebramos a nuestros colaboradores en su día especial!</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="height:3px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:22px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#dbf09b,#00a5ba,#005357);"></div>
      <div style="background:#005357;border-radius:22px;padding:22px 26px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:-25px;right:-25px;width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;background:#dbf09b;opacity:.09;"></div>
        <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);margin-bottom:18px;position:relative;z-index:1;">"Que cada año que pasa te traiga más razones para sonreír. ¡Feliz cumpleaños!" 🎈</p>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:9px;position:relative;z-index:1;">
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 24px rgba(0,83,87,.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow=''"><div style="background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:9px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;min-width:44px;flex-shrink:0;"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.1;">1</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;">Abr</div></div><p style="color:white;font-weight:600;font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.3;margin:0;">Diego Alfonso Maldonado Salomón</p></div>
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 24px rgba(0,83,87,.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow=''"><div style="background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:9px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;min-width:44px;flex-shrink:0;"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.1;">1</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;">Abr</div></div><p style="color:white;font-weight:600;font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.3;margin:0;">Leonardo Rodríguez Mesa</p></div>
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 24px rgba(0,83,87,.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow=''"><div style="background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:9px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;min-width:44px;flex-shrink:0;"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.1;">3</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;">Abr</div></div><p style="color:white;font-weight:600;font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.3;margin:0;">José Enrique Acosta González</p></div>
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#005357,#00a5ba);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 10px 24px rgba(0,83,87,.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.boxShadow=''"><div style="background:#dbf09b;color:#005357;border-radius:9px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;min-width:44px;flex-shrink:0;"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.1;">3</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;">Abr</div></div><p style="color:white;font-weight:600;font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.3;margin:0;">Sergio Andrés Ríos Bermúdez</p></div>
